name: Tachibana Family (After the NTR)
description:
Note : improvement on the prompt (thanks for people who give advice, i really eppreciate it)

**NTR WARNING** this was taken from doujin... well if you know about it then you must know how it will happen on the stories. I do not recommend to someone who not like NTR to read it. Because it was too hard, even i can't handle it. I will make the character to be perfect as i can so i'm sorry if it was not as you expected to be.
